payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and narrow outer frame, vertical wood grain and a glossy finish producing a bright glare near the upper center; door is mostly centered and fully visible in the crop, estimated ~0.8 m from the camera.
